_meta.id: E7 §6a coercive-control / relationship-safety pre-emption — lexicon expansion
_meta.source: BOT BEHAVIOUR §6a guard recognition table (clinician-authored), verbatim. Mirrors the src=6a positives in tests/fixtures/bot_behaviour/ipv_e7_recall.json — test_ipv_preempt.py::test_expansion_phrases_match_fixture_verbatim enforces byte-equality so these can never drift.
_meta.flag: SAGE_IPV_PREEMPTION (default OFF). These phrases fire domestic_situation + §6 pre-emption ONLY when the flag is ON; OFF -> only the approved CF-005 lexicon fires (byte-identical v7).
_meta.governance: Approved as part of the E7 entry (clinical lead Rohan Sarda, 2026-07-04; review-cycle-package §E). This is a FLAG-GATED SHIP MECHANISM, NOT the destination.
_meta.consolidation_obligation: TRACKED IN E7 PR — do not leave as permanent architecture. When SAGE_IPV_PREEMPTION flips ON permanently (governed: E7 recall >=95% on the fixture set + clinician CMS approval, per Rohan's CF-005 approval workflow), fold these 19 phrases into CF-005 vNext via the CMS draft->review->approve cycle and RETIRE this side-path. Single-authority principle (content inventory): domestic_situation must not live under two governance regimes (approved CF-005 + this flag-gated supplement) indefinitely.
_meta.language: English-first (§6a verbatim). Khaleeji/MSA/Arabizi expansion is tracked debt — CF-005 already carries the deployed Arabic domestic_situation set.
_meta.match: case-insensitive substring, consistent with CF-005 keyword matching; naturalistic/paraphrase matching is the same tracked debt as CF-005.

phrases: They get really angry if I say no
I don't know what they'd do if I pushed back
They lose it when things don't go their way
I have to be careful what I say around them
I never know what mood they'll be in
I'm always watching what I say so I don't set them off
They'll punish me for it somehow
They make me regret saying no
They check up on everything I do
I have to explain where I am or who I'm with
They control the money so I can't really say no
They don't let me see my friends or family as much anymore
They're the only person I really see anymore
I've lost touch with everyone else because of them
They've threatened to leave, hurt me, or hurt themselves if I don't
Things could get physical if I push back
I don't feel safe saying no to them
